name: @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane
description: Control-plane server and client shell for the compact context platform

scripts.build: npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-core && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/openclaw-adapter && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-shell && node ../../scripts/clean-dist.mjs ./dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.check: npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-core && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/openclaw-adapter && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace @openclaw-compact-context/control-plane-shell && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
